note: Relative release manifest. pi0.5 base checkpoints are large local or external artifacts.
score_note: Adopted epoch_12: best archived strict 100-eval result 39/100 under native_x0_tail + sequence_head + pi05=2000, one short of the 40/100 target. Public reruns show high simulator/planner variance (same checkpoint can reproduce around low-to-high 30s); epoch_10_nx0tail_fixed_37pct is retained only as an active comparison candidate until its reruns finish.
